tasks.label: Janitorfin: Package Zip
args: $publishDir = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'artifacts/publish/Janitorfin'; $packageDir = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'artifacts/package'; $zipPath = Join-Path $packageDir 'Janitorfin.zip'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $packageDir | Out-Null; if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item $zipPath -Force; } Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path $publishDir '*') -DestinationPath $zipPath

tasks.label: Janitorfin: Deploy To Jellyfin
args: $publishDir = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'artifacts/publish/Janitorfin'; $deployDir = '${input:jellyfinPluginDeployPath}'; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($deployDir)) { throw 'A Jellyfin plugin path is required.'; } New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $deployDir | Out-Null; Remove-Item (Join-Path $deployDir '*') -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item (Join-Path $publishDir '*') -Destination $deployDir -Recurse -Force
